title: ClientTimeAndWeatherControlMod
description:
A lightweight Forge-only client mod for time and weather modification. It opens the configuration interface by default using the C key. Use /ctwcdebug to check the mod status.

一个轻量级Forge仅客户端的时间与天气修改模组 默认使用C键打开配置界面 使用/ctwcdebug查看模组状态
body:
# ClientTimeAndWeatherControlMod 客户端时间和天气控制模组

```
A lightweight Forge client-only mod for time and weather modification.
一个轻量级Forge仅客户端的时间与天气修改模组
```
## Preliminary 前置
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## Other 其它


The inspiration for the development comes from DarkKronicle's [Client Time](https://github.com/DarkKronicle/ClientTime).

开发灵感来源于DarkKronicle的[Client Time](https://github.com/DarkKronicle/ClientTime)

By default, use the C key to open the configuration interface. Use /ctwcdebug to check the status of the mod.

默认使用C键打开配置界面 使用/ctwcdebug查看模组状态

Open source under the MIT License on [Github](https://github.com/Minecraft269/ClientTimeAndWeatherControlMod)

使用MIT协议在[Github](https://github.com/Minecraft269/ClientTimeAndWeatherControlMod)上开源

Feedback on issues can be submitted via the [issues](https://github.com/Minecraft269/ClientTimeAndWeatherControlMod/issues) section on GitHub.

问题反馈可在Github上的[issues](https://github.com/Minecraft269/ClientTimeAndWeatherControlMod/issues)提出


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Future plans to port to other versions (including mod loaders, etc.)

未来计划向其它版本移植(包括模组加载器等)

</details>
